title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti moves to the living room because he is unable to sleep due to Tiwari's loud snoring. Later, a confused Saxena enters the bedroom and beats Tiwari after mistaking him for Vibhuti.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti refuses to refer to Anita as his sister, despite a serpentine Manmohan threatening him to do so. Anita then decides to expose Manmohan.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Tiwari faints following a ban on high-value notes, jeopardising his hidden cash. Later, Vibhuti rejoices as Happu attempts to launder money through a wedding until the Commissioner spoils the plan.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Tiwari gets beaten at Anita's party after commenting on David's wife. Later, David opens up to Vibhuti about the girl of his dreams.

subTitle: Saumitra Babu's ghost prevents Tiwari and Vibhuti from defecating. Meanwhile, Saxena informs others about the presence of Saumitra Babu's spirit.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Angoori gets disappointed when Tiwari refuses to give her money for shopping. Later, Bhoore gives Angoori a cheque for INR 50 lakh in exchange for a promise.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Tiwari and Vibhuti ridicule Angoori, but she soon changes her behaviour on Saxena's advice. Later, she insults Vibhuti and leaves Tiwari annoyed by refusing to prepare his breakfast.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Angoori constantly berates Tiwari and Vibhuti at her kitty party. Later, an inebriated Tiwari gives a detailed account of the incident to Ammaji.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Anita and Bulbul get into a heated dispute. Meanwhile, Teeka confesses his feelings for Bulbul to Angoori, who decides to play matchmaker and arrange a marriage between Teeka and Bulbul.
